# BookEasy

> BookEasy is the online booking platform built for Polynesian businesses — salons, spas, doctors, sports coaches, and wellness pros. Clients book in two taps, pros get paid via PayZen (XPF), and a built-in loyalty XP system keeps customers coming back.

BookEasy operates in French Polynesia (fr-PF, currency XPF). Bookings, gift cards, and payments are routed through PayZen / OSB Polynésie. Stripe handles only pro subscription billing. The platform serves both clients (search, book, review) and merchants (calendar, services, analytics, patient notes for medical pros).

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://bookeasy.me/): pitch, featured merchants, FAQ
- [Search](https://bookeasy.me/search): find a pro by sector, city, name
- [Map](https://bookeasy.me/map): geo-localized merchant discovery
- [Sectors](https://bookeasy.me/sectors): browse by activity (hair, spa, medical, sport…)
- [Pricing](https://bookeasy.me/pricing): merchant plans — Free vs Pro
- [Gift cards](https://bookeasy.me/gift-cards): buy and send digital gift cards in XPF

## Sector-specific landing pages

BookEasy auto-generates SEO landing pages for each sector × Polynesian city combination, e.g. coiffeur-papeete, medecin-faaa, spa-bora-bora. These live under `/reservation/[slug]` and cover Papeete, Faaa, Punaauia, Pirae, Mahina, Arue, Paea, Bora Bora, Moorea, Rangiroa, Nuku Hiva, Tahiti and other major islands.

## Merchant fiches

Each professional has a public page at `/merchants/[id]` with services, schedule, photos, reviews, and a direct booking flow. These pages expose structured data (LocalBusiness, AggregateRating, OfferCatalog, OpeningHoursSpecification) for rich-result eligibility.

## Legal

- [Mentions légales](https://bookeasy.me/legal/mentions-legales)
- [Conditions générales d'utilisation](https://bookeasy.me/legal/cgu)
- [Politique de confidentialité](https://bookeasy.me/legal/confidentialite)

## Contact

- Email: bookeasy.pf@gmail.com
- Location: Punaauia, Polynésie française

## Optional

- The dashboard, profile pages, and account-management routes are disallowed for crawlers (no value for indexation, contain private user data).
- BookEasy is a single-language (French) product targeted at French Polynesia residents and visitors.
